name: OpenTelemetry Collector Dev
description: Installs OpenTelemetry Collector and Jaeger for local tracing and metrics in devcontainers

exporter.description: Telemetry exporter to configure: jaeger, zipkin, prometheus, or none

receivers.description: Comma-separated list of receivers to enable (otlp, zipkin, prometheus, jaeger)

autoInstrumentation.description: Enable OpenTelemetry auto-instrumentation for supported languages (Node.js, Python, Java)
